language - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer.SignonData
Language code (e.g., "ENG").

The language used in the response.

LAST_MONTH - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ReportPeriodPreset
The immediate calendar month prior to the reference date.
Ledger - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Represents a ledger, which primarily consists of a Journal containing all accounting transactions.
Ledger() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Ledger
 
ledgerBal - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.StatementResponse
The ledger balance of the account.
LEDGERBAL - Static variable in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxTags
Account balance
LedgerContainer - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger
A container class designed to hold LedgerEntry objects, organized by fiscal quarters.
LedgerContainer() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerContainer
Constructs a new LedgerContainer.
LedgerEntry - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger
Represents a single entry in a ledger, potentially supporting splits across multiple accounts or funds.
LedgerEntry() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerEntry
Default constructor for LedgerEntry.
LedgerImportService - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
Coordinates loading ledger spreadsheets and persisting the mapped transactions through the supplied persistence gateway.
LedgerImportService(LedgerPersistenceGateway) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LedgerImportService
Instantiates a new ledger import service.
LedgerImportService(LedgerSheetImporter, LedgerToDomainMapper, LedgerPersistenceGateway) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LedgerImportService
Instantiates a new ledger import service.

LedgerMetadata - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger
Represents metadata associated with a ledger or a set of ledger entries.
LedgerMetadata() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerMetadata
Constructs a new LedgerMetadata object.
LedgerPersistenceGateway - Interface in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
Boundary interface that isolates the ledger importer from the persistence mechanism used by the main application.
ledgerQ1 - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerContainer
List of ledger entries for the first quarter.
ledgerQ2 - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerContainer
List of ledger entries for the second quarter.
ledgerQ3 - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerContainer
List of ledger entries for the third quarter.
ledgerQ4 - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger.LedgerContainer
List of ledger entries for the fourth quarter.
LedgerQuarter - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
Represents all ledger rows from one quarter sheet (for example "Ledger_Q4").
LedgerQuarter(String) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LedgerQuarter

LedgerReconcilePanelFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
LedgerReconcilePanelFX â€“ lets the user: â€¢ pick an account â€¢ import bank transactions from an OFX file (via ofx4j 1.38) â€¢ add bank transactions manually â€¢ toggle "cleared" on any row â€¢ export uncleared items to CSV
LedgerReconcilePanelFX(ReconciliationService) - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.LedgerReconcilePanelFX

Handles the "Export Uncleared" button action.
LedgerReconcilePanelFX.Matcher - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
Provides a simple merging strategy for ledger and bank transactions.

Represents the context for generating a ledger report, typically for use with a templating engine like JXLS.
